description: Determines the specific effect for Damage spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the specific effect for Damage spell types. Roll 1d10, 2d10, or 3d10 based on Powerful results.

entries.result: Detect the presence of damage or harm to someone or something

resultTranslations.en: Detect the presence of damage or harm to someone or something
